name: midos
display_name: MidOS — Casper Wallet for AI Agents
description: Casper wallet for AI agents. Check CSPR balance and pay for x402-gated APIs with EIP-712 signed authorizations — no API keys, no accounts.
long_description:
Give your AI agent a Casper wallet. MidOS adds tools for:

- **check_balance** — View your CSPR balance, public key, and account hash
- **pay** — Sign a Casper x402 payment authorization (EIP-712 TransferWithAuthorization, Ed25519)
- **x402_fetch** — Fetch a URL with automatic x402 payment handling
- **transfer_cspr** — Send native CSPR to another account
- **transfer_token** — Send a CEP-18 token on Casper
- **request_funding** — Get a funding request (address + faucet hint)
- **spending_report** — Audit per-call and daily spend
- **search_bazaar** — Discover x402-gated services

Use your Ed25519 secret key to pay on Casper Testnet or Mainnet. Budget limits protect your funds: set max per call and max per day.

casper_secret_key.title: Casper Secret Key (Ed25519)
casper_secret_key.description: Your Casper Ed25519 secret key as hex or PEM contents. Used to sign x402 payments and transfers on Casper Testnet or Mainnet. Stored securely in your OS keychain.

network.title: Default Network
network.description: Casper network: casper (mainnet), casper-test (testnet), or casper-nctl (local).

x402_token_contract.title: CEP-18 Token Contract (optional)
x402_token_contract.description: Deployed CEP-18 x402 token contract package hash (hash-<hex>). Leave blank for the offchain demo. Required for on-chain settlement.

max_per_call.title: Max CSPR per Payment
max_per_call.description: Maximum CSPR allowed per single payment. Safety limit.

max_per_day.title: Max CSPR per Day
max_per_day.description: Maximum total CSPR allowed per calendar day.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check CSPR balance, public key, and account hash on the configured Casper network.

tools.name: pay
tools.description: Sign a Casper x402 payment authorization. Returns the Payment-Signature header value.

tools.name: x402_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL with automatic Casper x402 payment. Handles 402 responses by signing an EIP-712 authorization and retrying with the Payment-Signature header.
